subject: fix(security): escape all dynamic HTML content, normalize URLs
body:
Security:
- All meta.json values rendered into HTML are now escaped via
  escapeHtml() — badge, repo, privacy labels/values, use cases,
  liveUrl, repoUrl, and markdown table headers. Prevents XSS if
  meta.json ever contains user-controlled or malicious content.
- escapeHtml already handles &, <, >, " (added in previous commit)

Consistency:
- Normalized all Vercel URLs to include trailing slash — few-lap,
  synctone, sun-sea-o were missing it in both index.html and
  meta.json. All 12 live URLs now consistently end with /

Tags: security, xss, urls, cleanup
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: portfolio-site
Semver: patch

title: escape all dynamic HTML content, normalize URLs
